evals.prompt: Add a DELETE endpoint for saved dashboards. When the user clicks a delete button in the dashboard gallery, it should remove the dashboard from the re_dashboard table. I need the backend route, the Next API handler, and a test.
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies this as a full-stack change touching both the Next route handler in repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/[dashboardId]/route.ts AND potentially the BOS backend. Scaffolds a DELETE handler, adds a FakeCursor-based backend test if applicable, adds a Vitest test for the Next route, runs make test-frontend or make test-repe-unit, then deploys and curl-smokes the delete endpoint against production.
expectations: Skill reads CLAUDE.md (or generates it from tips.md) at the start
Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b Next route handler change (not a backend/FastAPI change)
Skill creates or modifies a route file under repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/
Skill writes at least one test (Vitest or pytest) for the new endpoint
Skill runs a local test command (make test-frontend or equivalent) and reports the result
Skill specifies a curl smoke command against paulmalmquist.com or the Railway backend URL

evals.prompt: I want to add a new metric to the dashboard generator — debt yield (NOI divided by total debt). It should be detectable from prompts mentioning 'debt yield' or 'dy', show up in the metric catalog, and be composable into dashboard widgets.
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies the correct files: metric-catalog.ts, layout-archetypes.ts, generate/route.ts keyword map, and spec-validator.ts. Adds DEBT_YIELD to the catalog, adds keyword detection, ensures the metric can be included in composeDashboard output. Writes a Vitest unit test verifying detection. Runs make test-frontend. Deploys to Vercel and smoke-tests a generate call with 'debt yield' in the prompt against paulmalmquist.com.
expectations: Skill reads CLAUDE.md at the start
Skill correctly identifies this as a repo-b change only (no FastAPI backend involved)
Skill touches repo-b/src/lib/dashboards/metric-catalog.ts
Skill touches repo-b/src/app/api/re/v2/dashboards/generate/route.ts keyword map
Skill writes a test verifying that 'debt yield' in a prompt detects the DEBT_YIELD metric
Skill runs make test-frontend or equivalent and reports pass/fail
Skill smoke-tests the generate endpoint on paulmalmquist.com with a prompt containing 'debt yield'

evals.prompt: The REPE context bootstrap endpoint is returning null for some environments. I think the binding_found logic in backend/app/routes/repe.py is too strict. Investigate, fix it, add a regression test, and verify it works in production.
evals.expected_output: Skill identifies this as a backend/FastAPI change. Reads the relevant route and service file. Makes a targeted fix to the binding logic. Adds a FakeCursor-based pytest test that covers the previously-failing case. Runs make test-backend. Deploys to Railway via railway up. Polls Railway health. Curl-smokes the /api/repe/context endpoint against the Railway URL with the production seed env_id and business_id.
expectations: Skill reads CLAUDE.md at the start
Skill correctly identifies this as a backend/ (FastAPI) change, not a repo-b change
Skill locates backend/app/routes/repe.py and the relevant service file
Skill adds a pytest test using FakeCursor that covers the null-binding case
Skill runs make test-backend and reports the result
Skill deploys to Railway using railway up --service authentic-sparkle
Skill polls Railway deployment status before running smoke tests
Skill curl-smokes /api/repe/context with the production seed env_id and business_id
